chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.623 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.3914/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3715/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.03.2025 Mr. Muteeullah Gondal, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Iftikhar Ahmed son of Ali Sher, who is in custody in FIR No.177/2024, registered at P.S. Ahmed Pur Siyal, District Jhang, Punjab for offence under section 395, 412, PPC and seeks protective-cum-transitory bail so that he may be able to approach the concerned Court. Applicant has approached the trial Court for same relief, which was declined by the trial Court concerned vide order dated 13.02.2025, where the applicant is facing the trial. Since the applicant/accused is in custody and it is the function of the Investigating Officer to seek transfer of investigation or custody of applicant/accused from the learned Court where his custody is required. No case for grant of protective-cum- transitory bail is made, as such, instant criminal bail application is dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
